ships.name: Carnival Jubilee
ships.notes: Class labeled 'Excel Class' on official fact sheet. Fact sheet lists no named venues.

exp.overview: Excel-class (third in class after Mardi Gras and Celebration), LNG-powered
activities: Carnival WaterWorks (Blue Lightning, Orange Thunder, Twister)
SportSquare (mini-golf, basketball, ropes, jogging track, soccer, volleyball, foosball, ping-pong)

ships.name: Carnival Firenze
ships.notes: Official ship page labels class 'Venice Class' (ex-Costa Firenze). Dedicated fact-sheet slug 404'd; specs read from official ship page.

exp.overview: 135,156 GT; 4,126 guests; 1,061 ft; 1,425 crew; Carnival Fun Italian Style ship
activities: SportSquare (ropes course, jogging track, mini golf, fitness)

ships.name: Carnival Venezia
ships.notes: Official ship page labels class 'Venice Class' (ex-Costa Venezia). Dedicated fact-sheet slug 404'd; specs read from official ship page.

exp.overview: Carnival Fun Italian Style ship (Venice-inspired theming)
activities: SportSquare (ropes course, jogging track, mini golf)

ships.name: Carnival Celebration
ships.notes: Class labeled 'Excel Class' on official fact sheet. Fact sheet lists no named venues.

exp.overview: Excel-class, LNG-powered; organized into seven themed zones

ships.name: Carnival Luminosa
ships.notes: Class labeled 'Spirit Class' on official fact sheet. Year is Carnival service entry (2022).

exp.overview: Spirit-class ship (ex-Costa Luminosa)

ships.name: Mardi Gras
ships.notes: Class labeled 'Excel Class' on official fact sheet. Built at Meyer Turku.

exp.overview: Excel-class ship, LNG-powered, homeports Port Canaveral; organized into six themed zones
activities: Carnival WaterWorks (Blue Lightning, Orange Thunder, Twister slides)

dining.name: Guy's Pig & Anchor Bar-B-Que Smokehouse | Brewhouse

ships.name: Carnival Encounter
ships.notes: Class labeled 'Adventure Class' on official fact sheet (ex-P&O Australia Pacific Encounter). Fact sheet at /news/ path.

Cloud 9 Spa / day spa & salon (extra charge)

needs_manual: features: Official fact sheets list no named onboard venues/features for any ship; per-ship features left empty. Named features would need to be read from each carnival.com/cruise-ships/<ship> page if desired.
flag: All 29 in-service ships have official specs (name/class/year/tonnage/guests) from Carnival newsroom fact sheets. Roster confirmed against carnival.com/cruise-ships; excluded not-yet-in-service Carnival Tropicale (2028) and Carnival Festivale (2027). Class labels are Carnival's official fact-sheet wording (e.g. 'Venice Class' for Firenze/Venezia, 'Adventure Class' for Adventure/Encounter, 'Splendor Class', 'Sunshine Class'). Carnival Sunrise year (1999) is the vessel's original service entry per its official fact sheet; renamed 2019.
